tooltip.redstonelapismod.redstone_goggle: Nearby ores shimmer with redstone motes
tooltip.redstonelapismod.rocket_boots.ch: Sneak + hold Jump (or hold Jump mid-air) to charge a redstone blast, release to fire
tooltip.redstonelapismod.rocket_boots.mo: Launches you skyward — or forward while gliding
tooltip.redstonelapismod.headgear.insert: Right-click a battery onto this item to install it
tooltip.redstonelapismod.battery.desc: Stores redstone charge to power gadgets
tooltip.redstonelapismod.rocket_launcher: Fires the rocket in your offhand — or the first in your inventory
Damage and effects come from the loaded rocket
tooltip.redstonelapismod.rocket_ammo.des: Ammunition for the Redstone Rocket Launcher
tooltip.redstonelapismod.redstone_rocket: Concussive blast — hurls creatures, leaves blocks intact
tooltip.redstonelapismod.mega_rocket.bla: Devastating blast — bigger than TNT, wrecks terrain
tooltip.redstonelapismod.nuke_rocket.bla: Cataclysmic blast — triple TNT, leaves a crater
tooltip.redstonelapismod.nuke_rocket.war: Do not fire at anything you want to keep
tooltip.redstonelapismod.lapis_laser.bea: A dead-straight railgun beam — no arc, no explosion
tooltip.redstonelapismod.lapis_laser.eff: Kills bleed extra experience; struck blocks turn to lapis
tooltip.redstonelapismod.echo_lens.scan: Sends a sonar pulse that reveals nearby creatures through walls
tooltip.redstonelapismod.lapis_gadget.fe: Right-click Concentrated Lapis Lazuli onto this item to fuel it
tooltip.redstonelapismod.paragon.desc: A flawless gem cut from impossible knowledge
tooltip.redstonelapismod.paragon.effect: Raises every maxed enchantment another level — no limit
tooltip.redstonelapismod.paragon.hint: Click onto enchanted gear or a book — consumed on use
tooltip.redstonelapismod.concentrated_la: A dense shard of deep-earth lapis, humming with power
message.redstonelapismod.battery.no_reds: No redstone dust to charge with
message.redstonelapismod.echo_lens.no_ch: The lens is dark — no lapis charge
